# VER-QUIC-RFC9002-0004 - QUIC RFC 9002 PTO Timer Discipline Verification

## Scope

This verification covers the RFC 9002 PTO timer discipline slice for arming, restart, backoff reset, and validation-aware pre-confirmation gating. It keeps PTO expiry as scheduler state only and does not claim probe composition, retry reset, migration path switching, or packet-loss declaration on PTO expiry.

## Requirements Verified

- REQ-QUIC-RFC9002-S6P2-0003
- REQ-QUIC-RFC9002-S6P2P1-0006
- REQ-QUIC-RFC9002-S6P2P1-0008
- REQ-QUIC-RFC9002-S6P2P1-0009
- REQ-QUIC-RFC9002-S6P2P2P1-0001
- REQ-QUIC-RFC9002-S6P2P2P1-0002
- REQ-QUIC-RFC9002-S6P2P2P1-0003
- REQ-QUIC-RFC9002-S6P2P2P1-0004
- REQ-QUIC-RFC9002-S6P2P2P1-0005
- REQ-QUIC-RFC9002-S6P2P2P1-0006

## Verification Method

Focused requirement-home tests and inspection evidence from the recovery-timing, send-runtime, handshake-validation, and path-validation seams.

## Preconditions

- The Incursa.Quic solution builds successfully.
- The targeted RFC 9002 requirement-home tests are discoverable by the test runner.

## Procedure or Approach

- Run the requirement-home tests for the 10 targeted RFC 9002 clauses.
- Inspect the recovery-timing and send-runtime helpers to confirm PTO arming, restart, and backoff reset flow through packet-space recovery state.
- Confirm the validation seam gates pre-confirmation PTO without widening into probe composition or loss declaration.

## Expected Result

The runtime arms PTO from packet-space recovery state, restarts and resets PTO backoff on the supported send, acknowledgment, and key-discard transitions, suppresses pre-confirmation PTO where validation is incomplete, and leaves PTO expiration to schedule probe work without marking packets lost.
